meta.title: Pilates Exercise Database
meta.source: Mat list follows the classical order of Pilates (public domain). Apparatus repertoire is standard studio work. Schema fields (spinal position, spring setting, apparatus, movement type) reflect common flow/sequencing practice.
meta.transition_model: Transition smoothness is computed from shared apparatus + spinal position + orientation + spring setting. An apparatus change is a MAJOR transition (best practice: keep to ~5 or fewer per class). Reformer is split into stations (standard, short box, long box, jumpboard) that should each be set up only once. Same attributes = seamless.

cues: Pump arms, breathe 5-in 5-out
Modification: legs higher = easier

props.magic_circle: Circle between ankles — squeeze on each set of pumps for inner-thigh + deep core.
props.small_ball: Ball behind the head/upper back to support the curl and cue chest lift.

cues: Peel spine off mat one bone at a time
Modification: bend knees = easier

props.magic_circle: Circle between palms overhead — press lightly to keep shoulders connected as you roll.
props.band: Band around the feet — use for support and control on the way up and down.

cues: Control the roll, no momentum
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Anchor pelvis, circle from the hip
Modification: smaller circle = easier

props.small_ball: Ball under the sacrum for pelvic feedback and stability.
props.band: Band around the working foot to guide the circle and add resistance.
props.block: Block under the sacrum for supported pelvic stability.

cues: Stay in a tight ball, roll to shoulders
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Pull knee in, reach opposite long
Modification: head down = easier

props.magic_circle: Circle between palms — press as you switch legs to keep the upper body lifted.
props.small_ball: Ball behind the head to keep the neck long, or under the sacrum for feedback.

cues: Reach and circle, keep low back down
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.

props.small_ball: Ball behind the head to support the curl through the reach.

cues: Grow tall then round over
Modification: bend knees = easier

props.magic_circle: Circle between palms — press forward as you round to engage the chest and serratus.
props.small_ball: Sit on/near the ball or hold it forward to guide the round-over.
props.band: Band around the feet to support tight hamstrings and reach long.
props.block: Sit on the block to find neutral and unload tight hamstrings (great for restricted clients).

cues: Balance then roll with control
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Circle legs, keep shoulders anchored
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Twist and reach past the little toe
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.

props.band: Band around the feet to support the forward reach with tight hamstrings.
props.block: Sit on the block to lengthen the spine before rotating.

cues: Lift long through the chest
Modification: swan prep = easier

props.small_ball: Ball under the chest/ribs to support and reduce range for beginners.

cues: Elbows down, kick heel to seat
Lengthen the front of the body before you lift; open across the chest.
Kick 3x then reach and lift
Lengthen the front of the body before you lift; open across the chest.
Hands behind head, roll up tall
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Support hips, split legs long
Support the weight in the shoulders, never the neck.
Pedal with control, hips lifted
Support the weight in the shoulders, never the neck.
Lift hips, extend one leg
Modification: no leg = easier

props.magic_circle: Circle between knees — press to hold neutral pelvis and fire glutes/adductors.
props.small_ball: Ball between the knees to hold neutral and engage inner thighs.
props.band: Band around the thighs to cue abduction and keep knees tracking.
props.bosu: Feet on the Bosu (dome up) to add instability to the bridge.
props.block: Block between the thighs for adductor engagement and neutral tracking.

cues: Sit tall, twist from the waist
Rotate from the waist, keep both hips square and anchored.

props.block: Sit on the block for a tall neutral start to the rotation.

cues: Reach legs to the ceiling, control down
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Stack hips, stable torso
Hold a neutral pelvis and long spine throughout.

props.band: Band around the ankles for added resistance through the leg series.
props.bosu: Bottom hip on the Bosu to challenge lateral stability.

cues: Roll up to a V, reach long
Modification: teaser prep = easier

props.magic_circle: Circle between ankles or palms — squeeze to stabilize as you balance in the V.

cues: Circle legs, keep torso lifted
Rotate from the waist, keep both hips square and anchored.
Flutter opposite arm and leg
Lengthen the front of the body before you lift; open across the chest.

props.weight: Very light weights in the hands to load the extension (advanced).
props.bosu: Lie prone over the Bosu to support the extension and add balance.

cues: Plank, lift one leg without shifting
Lengthen the front of the body before you lift; open across the chest.

props.trx: Feet in the straps for a suspended plank — control the pike/knee-in.

cues: Reverse plank, lift one leg
Lengthen the front of the body before you lift; open across the chest.

props.trx: Hands or feet suspended for reverse-plank stability work.

cues: Kneel, reach down, kick the top leg
Reach long out of the side waist, don't collapse into it.
Lift the hips into a side plank
Modification: seated mermaid = easier

props.weight: A light weight in the top hand increases the side-body challenge.

cues: Combine teaser and rollover flow
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Clap heels, roll and balance
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Roll to forehead, control
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Hold ankles, rock with breath
Lengthen the front of the body before you lift; open across the chest.
Split legs overhead, hold one
Support the weight in the shoulders, never the neck.
Walk out, push up, roll up
Modification: knees = easier

props.trx: Feet or hands in the straps to add suspension instability to the push-up.
props.bosu: Hands or feet on the Bosu to challenge shoulder and core stability.

cues: Press out, control home, heels/toes/arches
Hold a neutral pelvis and long spine throughout.

props.magic_circle: Circle between ankles on the footbar — adds adductor work to the press.

cues: Straps in hands, pump and breathe
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Roll up and over, articulate down
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Bend-open-close-bend with straps
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Lie on box, pull straps to hips
Lengthen the front of the body before you lift; open across the chest.
Reach wide like a T
Lengthen the front of the body before you lift; open across the chest.
Press bar down, lift chest
Lengthen the front of the body before you lift; open across the chest.
Round back, roll away and in
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.

props.block: Block between the knees on the short box for adductor connection.

cues: Hinge tall with flat back
Hold a neutral pelvis and long spine throughout.

props.block: Block between the knees to hold alignment through the hinge.

cues: Twist then hinge
Rotate from the waist, keep both hips square and anchored.
Reach over the side, lift up
Reach long out of the side waist, don't collapse into it.
Round spine, press carriage with heels
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Round/flat/reach/twist on carriage
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Round, arched, knees off
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Alternate heels, articulate feet
Hold a neutral pelvis and long spine throughout.
Bridge, press carriage out and in
Lengthen the front of the body before you lift; open across the chest.

props.magic_circle: Circle between knees — squeeze at the top of the bridge.

cues: Plank on footbar, move as one piece
Hold a neutral pelvis and long spine throughout.
Thighs to bar, press and lift chest
Lengthen the front of the body before you lift; open across the chest.
Pike up, press to plank
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Side bend pressing the bar
Reach long out of the side waist, don't collapse into it.
Jump and land softly, articulate feet
Land softly, roll through the whole foot.
Straps in hands, chest press / fly
Hold a neutral pelvis and long spine throughout.

props.band: Band mimics the straps for chest press/fly if adding load on the mat.
props.weight: Light 1–3 lb weights to load the supine arm series; keep shoulders down.

cues: Kneel tall, control the straps
Hold a neutral pelvis and long spine throughout.

props.weight: Light weights add load to kneeling arm work — stay tall through the spine.

cues: Roll down bar to bar, articulate
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Circles and scissors against springs
Hold a neutral pelvis and long spine throughout.
Kneel or stand, control the springs
Hold a neutral pelvis and long spine throughout.
Press bar overhead, articulate
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Legs on bar, roll up and over
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Hang from ankle cuffs, control
Support the weight in the shoulders, never the neck.
Standing roll down at the board
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Lie at the board, press legs
Hold a neutral pelvis and long spine throughout.
Face away, open the springs
Set the shoulder blade down the back before reaching.

props.band: Band supplements the springs for graded arm resistance.
props.weight: Add hand weights for progressive arm loading at the board.

cues: Sit tall, press the pedal down
Hold a neutral pelvis and long spine throughout.
Hands on pedal, pike hips up
Initiate from deep abdominals, curl bone by bone.
Step up, press to standing
Find a focal point; stabilize before you move.

Lengthen the front of the body before you lift; open across the chest.

Reach long out of the side waist, don't collapse into it.
Press pedal down with straight arms
Hold a neutral pelvis and long spine throughout.

props.magic_circle: Circle in hands adds feedback to the triceps press.
props.weight: Hold a light weight to increase the triceps demand.

cues: Balance on the seat, control the pedal

Find a focal point; stabilize before you move.

props.weight: Light weights for arm circles/pullovers over the barrel.

cues: Scissors and circles supported
Hold a neutral pelvis and long spine throughout.

cues: Stand tall in neutral, ribs knitted.

cues: Sit tall on the sits bones, spine long.
